case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LUIS ALBERTO LAGUNA PERALTA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERALTA, LUIS ALBERTO LAGUNA $975.73 PRINCIPAL, $174.26 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,234.99, PRINCIPAL BALANCE OF $961.73 PLUS $14.00 LATE FEE PLUS CONTRACT INTEREST ON PRINCIPAL BALANCE ONLY FROM 5/5/18 PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LUIS ALBERTO LAGUNA PERALTA DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,119.34 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PERALTA, LUIS ALBERTO LAGUNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $83.00 SERVED AUG-27-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PERALTA, LUIS ALBERTO LAGUNA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
